title: senecio cacaliaster subsp. hercynicus
intro: Senecio cacaliaster subsp. hercynicus, also known as Hercules Jacob's ladder or Jacob's ladder, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio cacaliaster subsp. hercynicus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but due to its toxicity, it's essential to use it under the guidance of a qualified herbalist or healthcare professional.
